results.description: ENGINEERING SERVICES RELATED TO HARDWARE AND SOFTWARE ARE REQUIRED TO CONTINUE DEVELOPMENT OF DIAGNOSTIC SOFTWARE AND TPSS TO SUPPORT WEAPONS SYSTEMS CURRENTLY IN THE FIELD, WHICH WILL HELP SUPPORT READINESS FUNCTIONS OF THOSE WEAPONS SYSTEMS.
